name: Pizza Flavored Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine the grated Parmesan cheese, garlic powder, Italian herb seasoning, paprika, and salt and black pepper. Blend for about 3 minutes until well combined.
2. Place the hot popcorn in a large bowl. Sprinkle the cheese mixture evenly over the popcorn.
3. Toss the popcorn gently to coat it thoroughly with the cheese mixture.
4. Serve immediately. Makes 3 quarts.
